name: insert_code_cell
description: Insert a code cell into a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) at a given index using the Notebook API.

path.description: Absolute path to the .ipynb file on disk.

index.description: 0-based index where the new cell should be inserted.

code.description: Code content of the new cell.

languageId.description: Language ID for the cell (e.g., "python", "sql", "javascript"). Defaults to "python".
